recommendations.title: Atlanta Hawks Moneyline
recommendations.reason: Atlanta Hawks is a short moneyline favorite, which keeps the market edge intact without asking for extra margin beyond a straight-up win.

recommendations.title: Detroit Pistons +11.5
recommendations.matchup: Detroit Pistons at Oklahoma City Thunder
recommendations.reason: Double-digit cushion at near-standard juice can be valuable in volatile NBA games, especially when the favorite must win by a large margin to cash.
